zh.lifeSummary: 當Llywarch ap Trahaearn於1070年出生在威爾士布洛可爾時，他的父親Trahaiarn ap Caradog27歲，母親Nest ferch Gruffudd11歲。他於大約1092年與Dyddgu verch Iorwerth在威爾士結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1129年在喀麥隆諾爾德享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Llywarch ap Trahaearn于1070年出生在威尔士布洛可爾时，他的父亲Trahaiarn ap Caradog27岁，母亲Nest ferch Gruffudd11岁。他于大约1092年与Dyddgu verch Iorwerth在威尔士结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1129年在喀麦隆諾爾德享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Trahaearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Treharne
meanings: Welsh (Glamorgan and Carmarthenshire): from the Welsh personal name Trahaearn, composed of the elements tra ‘most, very’ + haearn ‘iron’.

nameMeanings.name: Llywarch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional, now only occasionally used: compound of the god's name Lugu- ( see Lleu ) + Old Celtic marcos ‘horse’.

en.lifeSummary: When Llywarch ap Trahaearn was born in 1070, in Pembrokeshire, Wales, his father, Trahaiarn ap Caradog, was 27 and his mother, Nest ferch Gruffudd, was 11. He married Dyddgu verch Iorwerth about 1092, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1129, in North, Cameroon, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Llywarch ap Trahaearn est né en 1070, à Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, Trahaiarn ap Caradog, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Nest ferch Gruffudd, avait 11 ans. Il a épousé Dyddgu verch Iorwerth environ 1092, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1129, à Nord, Cameroun, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Llywarch ap Trahaearn 1070 in Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Trahaiarn ap Caradog 27 und seine Mutter Nest ferch Gruffudd 11. Er hat um 1092 in Wales Dyddgu verch Iorwerth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1129 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Nord, Kamerun.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Llywarch ap Trahaearn è nato il nel 1070 nel Pembrokeshire, Galles, il suo padre, Trahaiarn ap Caradog, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Nest ferch Gruffudd, aveva 11 anni. Lui sposato Dyddgu verch Iorwerth circa 1092, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1129, nel Nord, Camerun, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Trahaearnが1070年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアで生まれた時，父Trahaiarn ap Caradogは27歳，母Nest ferch Gruffuddは11歳であった。約1092年にウェールズでDyddgu verch Iorwerthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1129年にカメルーンノードで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Llywarch ap Trahaearn(이)가 1070년 웨일스 p브로케실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Trahaiarn ap Caradog(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Nest ferch Gruffudd(은)는 11세였다. 그는 대략 1092년 웨일스에서 Dyddgu verch Iorwerth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1129년 카메룬 노르드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Llywarch ap Trahaearn nasceu em 1070, em Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, Trahaiarn ap Caradog, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Nest ferch Gruffudd, tinha 11 anos. Ele casou-se com Dyddgu verch Iorwerth aproximadamente 1092, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1129, em Nord, Camarões, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Llywarch ap Trahaearn родился в 1070 г. в местности пемброкешир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Trahaiarn ap Caradog было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Nest ferch Gruffudd, 11. Он женился на женщине по имени Dyddgu verch Iorwerth около 1092 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1129 г. в местности норд, Камерун в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Llywarch ap Trahaearn nació en 1070, en Pembrokeshire, Gales, su papá, Trahaiarn ap Caradog, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Nest ferch Gruffudd, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Dyddgu verch Iorwerth aproximadamente 1092, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1129, en Nord, Camerún, a la edad de 59 años.
